signals.summary: Hypothesis segment: agencies serving banks or financial services may map to Flashpoint proof.
signals.ability_to_act_evidence: Agencies already selling paid research projects into banks may have budget-backed client demand.
signals.willingness_to_act_evidence: Needs validation through revenue map and proof asset review.

signals.summary: Hypothesis segment: agencies doing survey programming may understand Flashpoint as delivery leverage.
signals.ability_to_act_evidence: Survey programming work implies existing project revenue and operational delivery burden.
signals.willingness_to_act_evidence: Needs validation through agency account research and discovery.

source_notes: Seeded as hypothesis segments, not real target accounts.
Replace with researched agency accounts before live outreach.
